mapper.sql: Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Reject_Content, Reject_Date, Inbox_Id, Create_Date
mapper.insert:
insert into unsubscribe_log (Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Reject_Content, Reject_Date, Inbox_Id, Create_Date) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reject_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reject_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{inbox_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS Id

insert into unsubscribe_log (Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Reject_Content, Reject_Date, Inbox_Id, Create_Date) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reject_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reject_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.inbox_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Phone_No, Reject_Content, Reject_Date, Inbox_Id, Create_Date,

update unsubscribe_log
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Product_No = #{record.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Sub_Code = #{record.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Phone_No = #{record.phone_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Reject_Content = #{record.reject_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Reject_Date = #{record.reject_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Inbox_Id = #{record.inbox_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
